name: Ayushman Bharat - Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana
description: Provides health insurance coverage of ₹5 lakh per family per year for secondary and tertiary care hospitalization.
eligibility: Low-income families identified by SECC data.

name: Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi (PM-KISAN)
description: Income support of ₹6,000 per year to all farmer families with cultivable land.
eligibility: Small and marginal farmers.
benefits: Direct benefit transfer in three installments.

name: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana (PMAY)
description: Affordable housing for urban and rural poor with subsidies on home loans.
eligibility: Economically weaker sections, low-income groups, and middle-income groups.

name: Mahatma Jyotiba Phule Jan Arogya Yojana
description: Health insurance scheme providing free treatment up to ₹1.5 lakh per family per year.
eligibility: Families with ration cards issued in Maharashtra.

name: Rajasthan Chiranjeevi Health Insurance Scheme
description: Provides health insurance coverage up to ₹25 lakh per family per year.
eligibility: All families in Rajasthan, including migrant workers.
benefits: Cashless treatment in government and private hospitals.

name: KALIA Scheme
description: Financial assistance to small and marginal farmers and landless agricultural households.
eligibility: Farmers and landless agricultural laborers in Odisha.
benefits: Direct cash support for cultivation and livelihood.

name: Rythu Bandhu Scheme
description: Investment support scheme providing ₹5,000 per acre per season to farmers.
eligibility: Farmers owning agricultural land in Telangana.

name: Swasthya Sathi
description: Provides health insurance coverage up to ₹5 lakh per family per year.
eligibility: All families in West Bengal.

name: Vahli Dikri Yojana
description: Financial assistance scheme for girl children to promote education and reduce child marriage.
eligibility: Families with annual income below ₹2 lakh.

name: Bhagyalakshmi Scheme
description: Financial assistance to girl children from below poverty line families.
eligibility: BPL families with girl children.
benefits: Fixed deposit in the name of the girl child, maturity benefits at 18 years.

name: Chief Minister's Comprehensive Health Insurance Scheme (CMCHIS)
description: Provides health insurance coverage up to ₹5 lakh per family per year.
eligibility: Low-income families in Tamil Nadu.

name: Karunya Health Scheme
description: Financial assistance for critical illness treatment.
eligibility: Families below poverty line in Kerala.
benefits: Coverage for cancer, heart disease, kidney ailments.

name: Sarbat Sehat Bima Yojana
description: Health insurance scheme providing coverage up to ₹5 lakh per family.
eligibility: Low-income families in Punjab.
benefits: Cashless treatment in government and private hospitals.

name: Atal Amrit Abhiyan
description: Health insurance scheme covering six critical diseases.
eligibility: Families below poverty line in Assam.
benefits: Coverage up to ₹2 lakh per family per year.

name: Mukhyamantri Kanya Utthan Yojana
description: Financial assistance to girls for education and empowerment.
eligibility: Girl children in Bihar.
benefits: Cash incentives at birth, school, and graduation stages.

name: Samajik Suraksha Pension Scheme
description: Provides social security pensions to elderly, widows, and disabled persons.
eligibility: Residents of Jharkhand meeting age or disability criteria.

name: Mukhyamantri Arogya Yojana
description: Provides free medical treatment for economically weaker sections.
eligibility: Low-income families in Madhya Pradesh.

name: Mukhyamantri Samuhik Vivah Yojana
description: Financial assistance for marriage of girls from poor families.
eligibility: Families below poverty line in Uttar Pradesh.

name: Delhi Ladli Scheme
description: Financial assistance to girl children for education and empowerment.
eligibility: Girl children born in Delhi with family income below ₹1 lakh.

name: Mukhyamantri Antyodaya Parivar Utthan Yojana
description: Provides skill training and employment opportunities to poor families.
eligibility: Families with annual income below ₹1.8 lakh.
benefits: Skill development, job placement, financial support.

name: Chief Minister’s Social Assistance Scheme
description: Provides pensions to elderly, widows, and persons with disabilities.
eligibility: Residents of Meghalaya meeting age or disability criteria.

name: Indira Gandhi Rojgar Guarantee Scheme
description: Provides guaranteed wage employment to rural households.
eligibility: Rural households in Himachal Pradesh.
benefits: 100 days of wage employment per year.

bestSchemes.name: Dayanand Social Security Scheme
bestSchemes.description: Provides pensions to senior citizens, widows, and persons with disabilities.
bestSchemes.eligibility: Residents of Goa meeting age or disability criteria.

bestSchemes.name: Chief Minister’s Rural Housing Mission
bestSchemes.description: Provides housing assistance to rural poor families.
bestSchemes.benefits: Financial support for construction of houses.

bestSchemes.name: Mukhyamantri Yuba Yogayog Scheme
bestSchemes.description: Provides financial assistance to students for purchasing smartphones.

bestSchemes.name: Chief Minister’s Health Scheme
bestSchemes.description: Provides free medical treatment to poor families.

bestSchemes.name: Chief Minister’s Health Insurance Scheme
bestSchemes.description: Provides health insurance coverage to low-income families.
bestSchemes.eligibility: Families below poverty line in Nagaland.

bestSchemes.name: Chief Minister’s Health Insurance Scheme
bestSchemes.description: Provides health insurance coverage to poor families.
bestSchemes.eligibility: Residents of Arunachal Pradesh below poverty line.

bestSchemes.name: Mizoram Health Care Scheme
bestSchemes.description: Provides health insurance coverage for critical illnesses.
bestSchemes.benefits: Coverage for cancer, heart disease, kidney ailments.

bestSchemes.name: Chandigarh Social Security Pension Scheme
bestSchemes.description: Provides pensions to elderly, widows, and disabled persons.
bestSchemes.eligibility: Residents of Chandigarh meeting age or disability criteria.
